Insights & thinking

What we've learned.
What we won't say
in a sales pitch.

Strategy, alignment, GTM, AI, and the things most B2B consultancies won't admit out loud.

AI & Marketing
AI Slop Is Real. And Your Marketing Team Is Probably Already Dealing With It.
Everyone in the company now has access to the same AI tools your marketing team uses. That creates a problem nobody is talking about honestly.
5 March 2026 · 8 min read →
AI
How a US Commercial Insurance Broker Cut Quote Times by 77% Without Adding Headcount
A mid-size commercial insurance broker in the US was spending 25 to 40 minutes per quote request. After deploying an AI-powered quoting layer, that dropped below 10 minutes. Here is what actually changed and what did not.
25 February 2026 · 7 min read →
AI
Agentic AI in B2B Marketing: What It Actually Is and What It Can Do for You
Agentic AI is generating real expectations in B2B marketing — and for good reason. Here is what it actually means for your team, and where it can make a difference this year.
11 February 2026 · 7 min read →
strategy
Your B2B Website Doesn't Need an Expensive Experience Management System. And It Probably Never Did.
Thousands of B2B companies are spending between €200,000 ($220,000) and over €1 million ($1.1M) implementing web platforms their marketing teams can barely touch without calling an agency. In 2026, there is no longer any excuse for this.
28 January 2026 · →
B2B marketing strategy
Stop Being Busy, Start Making Impact: Why Most B2B Marketing Doesn't Move the Needle
Your team is busier than ever — more content, more campaigns, more channels. But is any of it actually driving revenue? Here's how to break free from the activity trap and focus on B2B marketing that truly moves the needle.
13 January 2026 · →
AI & Marketing
AI in B2B marketing: what works, what's hype, what to do next quarter
Every B2B marketing team is somewhere on the AI adoption curve. Most are further behind than they think — but not in the way they assume.
30 December 2025 · 10 min read →
Fractional CMO
The fractional CMO model isn't a compromise. It's a competitive advantage.
Most B2B companies that hire a fractional CMO do it because they can't afford a full-time one. That's the wrong reason — and it leads to the wrong outcome.
16 December 2025 · 6 min read →
Strategy
Why 65% of B2B marketing budgets don't generate measurable impact
The alignment problem isn't new. But it's getting more expensive — and most companies are still solving it wrong.
